---
title: "Contact"
---



I am happy to discuss stochastic thermodynamics, nonequilibrium statistical physics, scientific visualization and possible collaborations.

## Links

- Email 1: iagomamede@usp.br
- Email 2: iagomamede9@gmail.com
- Email 3: iago.nascimento@uhasselt.br
- GitHub: [github.com/seuusuario](https://github.com/seuusuario)
- Google Scholar: [profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=IzlSrFEAAAAJ&hl=en)
- ORCID: [profile](#)
- LinkedIn: [profile](#)
